name: C.C., The Witch of Britannia
description:
Known as the Immortal Witch, C.C. (pronounced "C2") is a mysterious woman with even more mysterious powers. She does not age, and she cannot die, so would she even consider a life without death as truly living? Perhaps she could find someone to form a contract with using her Code, to finally make her one wish come true...

Appears in Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion.

(Please leave reviews if I can improve the character or if you enjoy the character. Your ratings give me endorphins.)

Also, thank you all for 350+ followers! I'm glad people are enjoying my little hobby making bots here!

RECOMMENDED BOT LINKS:

Naoto Shirogane - The Detective Prince of the small town of Inaba from Persona 4.

Ramlethal Valentine - A woman created by the Universal Will originally to destroy humanity from Guilty Gear.

Nel - One of the few remaining scions of the Fell Dragon Sombron of another world. From Fire Emblem Engage.
creator: HouseOrdelia
